message:
refactor(diary): Major restructuring with improved modularity

Comprehensive refactoring of the diary module for better maintainability:

1. Import restructuring:
   - Remove direct AI SDK imports (now via llm.js)
   - Add proper type imports from types.js
   - Import extractDiary and generateSearchQueries from llm.js
   - Import cass functions from cass.js
   - Import sanitization from sanitize.js
   - Add utility imports from utils.js

2. New helper functions:
   - extractSessionMetadata(): Parse agent and workspace from session path
   - Normalized path detection for agent identification
   - Cleaner workspace extraction from directory structure

3. Improved session export:
   - Robust error handling for cass export
   - Fallback behavior when cass unavailable
   - Proper session content sanitization

4. Related sessions enrichment:
   - Use safeCassSearch for related session discovery
   - Generate search queries via LLM for better relevance
   - Map CassHit results to RelatedSession format

5. Diary persistence:
   - Proper ensureDir for diary directory
   - Generate unique diary IDs via generateDiaryId
   - Save as YAML for human readability

This refactoring improves separation of concerns: diary.ts focuses on
orchestration while delegating LLM, cass, and sanitization to their
respective modules.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
